The '''INS-444 window installation droid''', sometimes referred to as an '''installer droid''', was a [[Class five droid/Legends|fifth-degree]] installer [[Droid/Legends|droid]] produced by [[Publictechnic]] during the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. INS-444 units commonly worked alongside [[CLE-004 window cleaning droid/Legends|CLE-004 window cleaning droids]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:INS444-FFp18.png|thumb|left|200px|Profile view of an INS-444 droid]]
The INS-444 was a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]]-equipped droid with two magnatomic grip pads used to hold a [[Window/Legends|window]] pane in place while traveling to its destination and during the installation process. Because most [[Coruscanti/Legends|Coruscanti]] preferred more delicate materials than [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]], such as [[Clari-crystalline]] or even glass, the droids would have to be extremely careful in both carrying the pane to the destination, as airspeeders would sometimes smash right through the pane before realizing they hit something. Often, two INS droids worked together to carry larger panes. Three manipulator arms were used to secure the pane to the window frame, and testing probes located on the droid's upper arms scanned the frame for any gaps in the airtight seal.<ref name="NEGD" />

==History==
INS-444 droids were a common sight in [[Galactic City/Legends|Galactic City]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], and were favored due to their ability to reach even the city-planet's tallest buildings. An INS-444 unit nicknamed "[[Mick/Legends|Mick]]" and its [[Buffy/Legends|counterpart]] replaced a window pane in [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala's]] [[Senate apartment complex/Legends|apartment]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], after [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] smashed through it in pursuit of an [[ASN-121/Legends|ASN-121]] [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]]. These droids saw continued use throughout the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and beyond.
